votes.rationale: Motion-0041 successfully proved the second live Claude usage path for dev-jai-nexus under code-heavy bounded-task conditions. The validated setup workflow, generated bootstrap pack, active motion package, and relevant code-surface loading worked together as a coherent implementation-oriented setup path.

The motion stayed appropriately scoped. It did not redesign the bootstrap generator or drift into provider orchestration, and instead produced concrete operational evidence about how the current Claude setup behaves once real code context and touched-file selection matter.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The second live usage report and passalong artifact now show that the Claude setup stack remains usable under implementation pressure while preserving the distinction between canonical artifacts, generated handoff layers, and task-local code context.
